prompt: A realistic candid street photo of a young East Asian woman sitting at a glass-walled bus stop on a bright sunny day in Japan, framed as a vertical portrait from mid-thigh up. She has dark brown hair tied back in a low ponytail with soft side bangs and wears small dangling earrings, a fitted white camisole or tank top under a white blazer, and a high-waisted dark navy or black pencil skirt. Her posture is relaxed, seated slightly angled toward the camera with one shoulder closer, giving a polished office-worker look. Behind her on the left is a bus route timetable board filled with Japanese text and route numbers, including visible numbers like 226, 609, 670, 632, and 合D32. On the right side in the background, a blue city bus with a yellow roof is approaching or stopped along the curb, softly out of focus. The bus shelter has reflective glass panels, metal framing, and a bench, with a sunlit sidewalk, tree shadows, and urban buildings in the distance. Use natural midday lighting with crisp highlights and soft shadows, shallow depth of field, realistic skin and fabric textures, clean commercial photography style, high detail, DSLR-like bokeh. Replace the obscured face area with a natural, fully visible face of an attractive adult woman, keeping the expression calm and neutral. Use white blazer with white top and dark skirt, dark brown, Japanese urban bus stop, and blue with a yellow roof.
